info.name: Langflow Playwright Test Analysis
info.description: Postman collection for analyzing Playwright test results using Langflow with Groq AI

item.name: 2. Analyze Test Results (with inline file data)

body.raw: {"output_type": "chat", "input_type": "text", "input_value": "Analyze the following Playwright test results and provide detailed insights on test execution, metrics, and recommendations", "session_id": "test-session-002", "file": {"config": {"version": "1.60.0"}, "suites": [{"title": "checkout.spec.ts", "specs": [{"title": "user can add item to cart", "ok": true, "tests": [{"status": "expected", "results": [{"status": "passed", "duration": 1820, "retry": 0}]}]}, {"title": "user can apply coupon", "ok": true, "tests": [{"status": "expected", "results": [{"status": "passed", "duration": 940, "retry": 0}]}]}, {"title": "user can complete payment", "ok": true, "tests": [{"status": "expected", "results": [{"status": "passed", "duration": 3120, "retry": 0}]}]}, {"title": "guest checkout works", "ok": true, "tests": [{"status": "expected", "results": [{"status": "passed", "duration": 2010, "retry": 0}]}]}]}], "errors": [], "stats": {"startTime": "2026-06-20T09:10:00.000Z", "duration": 7890, "expected": 4, "skipped": 0, "unexpected": 0, "flaky": 0}}}
